technology.title: NSA said to be readying Anthropic’s Mythos for use in cyber operations
technology.summary: The U.S. eavesdropping agency is reportedly preparing Anthropic's Mythos for use in cyberattacks, despite a federal ban on using the AI model maker.

briefing.news_focus: The U.S. eavesdropping agency is reportedly preparing Anthropic's Mythos for use in cyberattacks, despite a federal ban on using the AI model maker.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國國家安全局（NSA）據報導正在準備將Anthropic公司的AI模型Mythos用於網絡攻擊，儘管聯邦政府已禁止使用該AI模型製造商的技術。這一行動引發了對於政府機構在遵循法律與利用先進技術之間的道德與法律爭議。
briefing.background: Anthropic是一家專注於人工智慧的公司，其開發的Mythos模型在AI領域中具有先進的技術能力。美國政府對於AI技術的使用有著嚴格的規範，尤其是在國家安全和網絡作戰的背景下，這些規範旨在防止技術被不當使用或導致潛在的安全風險。NSA作為美國的主要情報機構，負責監控和保護國家安全，其對AI技術的興趣反映出當前科技在國防和情報工作中的重要性。
briefing.analysis: NSA準備使用Anthropic的Mythos進行網絡攻擊，顯示出政府在追求技術優勢與遵循法律之間的矛盾。儘管存在聯邦禁令，NSA的行動可能引發對於技術使用合法性和道德性的廣泛討論。支持這一行動的人士可能認為，利用先進的AI技術能夠提升國家安全能力，而反對者則可能指出這樣的行為違反了法律，並可能對公眾信任造成損害。未來，這一事件可能促使對AI技術使用的政策進行重新評估，並引發關於政府機構在科技發展中的角色的討論。

technology.title: Anthropic says the world should have option to ‘pause’ on AI
technology.summary: US firm says it will convene policymakers for discussion of dangers, in post detailing progress of its Claude model Anthropic has floated the idea of a worldwide “temporary pause” on AI development – and said it was going to convene “policymakers” to discuss the dangers of advanced AI – in its latest release touting the capabilities of its products. In a long post on Thursday, Anthropic detailed the progress of its AI model, Claude, towards “recursive self-improvement” – that is, being able to make better and more powerful versions of itself. Recursive self-improvement is a bugbear of AI safety researchers, viewed as the key step for AI to become superintelligent and therefore unleash widespread consequences on humanity. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: US firm says it will convene policymakers for discussion of dangers, in post detailing progress of its Claude model Anthropic has floated the idea of a worldwide “temporary pause” on AI development – and said it was going to convene “policymakers” to discuss the dangers of advanced AI – in its latest release touting the capabilities of its products. In a long post on Thursday, Anthropic detailed the progress of its AI model, Claude, towards “recursive self-improvement” – that is, being able to make better and more powerful versions of itself. Recursive self-improvement is a bugbear of AI safety researchers, viewed as the key step for AI to become superintelligent and therefore unleash widespread consequences on humanity. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國公司Anthropic提出全球暫停人工智慧（AI）發展的建議，並計劃召集政策制定者討論先進AI的潛在危險。該公司在最新發布中介紹了其AI模型Claude的進展，特別是其具備「遞歸自我改善」的能力，這被視為AI可能達到超智能的關鍵步驟，並可能對人類產生深遠影響。
briefing.background: 隨著AI技術的迅速發展，許多專家和研究者對其潛在風險表示擔憂。遞歸自我改善指的是AI系統能夠自我優化，進而創造出更強大的版本，這一過程可能導致難以控制的後果。各國政府和科技公司正在積極討論如何制定相關政策以確保AI的安全性與可控性。Anthropic的提議反映了業界對於AI發展速度與安全性之間的緊張關係，並可能引發更廣泛的政策討論。
briefing.analysis: Anthropic的提議可能會引起不同利益方的反應。一方面，科技公司可能會支持暫停發展，以便有更多時間來解決安全問題；另一方面，某些企業可能會反對此提議，因為這可能影響其競爭力與創新能力。政策制定者也可能在此議題上存在分歧，有些可能認同需要更嚴格的監管，而另一些則可能擔心過度干預會抑制技術進步。Anthropic的行動可能促使其他公司和政府重新評估其AI策略，並引發全球範圍內的討論與合作。

technology.title: Singapore orders social media platforms to block foreign posts targeting Indian community
technology.summary: Three social media platforms have been ordered to block access to 14 posts which “target the Indian community and undermine Singapore’s model of multiculturalism”, the Ministry of Home Affairs (MHA) said on Saturday. The police have issued disabling directions under the Online Criminal Harms Act to block access to the posts on YouTube, Facebook and X, MHA said in a statement. The direction required the platforms to “take all reasonable steps to disable access by Singapore users to these posts”,...

briefing.news_focus: Three social media platforms have been ordered to block access to 14 posts which “target the Indian community and undermine Singapore’s model of multiculturalism”, the Ministry of Home Affairs (MHA) said on Saturday. The police have issued disabling directions under the Online Criminal Harms Act to block access to the posts on YouTube, Facebook and X, MHA said in a statement. The direction required the platforms to “take all reasonable steps to disable access by Singapore users to these posts”,...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 新加坡內政部於週六宣布，已指示三個社交媒體平台封鎖14則針對印度社群的帖子，這些帖子被認為損害了新加坡的多元文化主義模式。根據《網上犯罪危害法》，警方發出禁用指令，要求YouTube、Facebook和X等平台採取所有合理步驟，禁止新加坡用戶訪問這些帖子。
briefing.background: 新加坡是一個以多元文化為基礎的社會，政府對於任何可能破壞社會和諧的言論持有高度警覺。隨著社交媒體的普及，外部信息對於社會的影響日益增強，特別是針對特定族群的言論可能引發社會緊張。因此，新加坡政府在《網上犯罪危害法》的框架下，積極監控和管理社交媒體內容，以維護社會穩定和公共安全。這項措施反映了政府對於保持社會和諧的重視，特別是在面對外部挑戰時。
briefing.analysis: 此次新加坡政府針對社交媒體平台的行動，顯示出其對於外部信息影響的高度警覺。封鎖針對印度社群的帖子，可能是因為這些內容被認為會引發社會分裂或矛盾。此舉不僅是對特定言論的直接反應，也反映了新加坡在維護社會和諧方面的政策取向。各社交媒體平台在執行這些禁令時，將面臨如何平衡言論自由與社會穩定的挑戰。未來，若類似事件頻繁發生，可能會引發更廣泛的討論，關於政府在數位時代中對言論的管控與監督的合理性。

politics.title: Past failures haunt Quad’s US$20 billion critical minerals push
politics.summary: The Quad’s newly announced US$20 billion critical minerals framework aims to loosen China’s near-monopoly on the materials that power modern defence, technology and clean energy industries. But analysts say its success will depend on the ability of Australia, the United States, India and Japan – the Quadrilateral Security Dialogue’s four members – to move beyond policy declarations and deliver measurable outcomes. The initiative, announced after a meeting of Quad foreign ministers on May 27, has...

briefing.news_focus: The Quad’s newly announced US$20 billion critical minerals framework aims to loosen China’s near-monopoly on the materials that power modern defence, technology and clean energy industries. But analysts say its success will depend on the ability of Australia, the United States, India and Japan – the Quadrilateral Security Dialogue’s four members – to move beyond policy declarations and deliver measurable outcomes. The initiative, announced after a meeting of Quad foreign ministers on May 27, has...
briefing.news_focus_zh: Quad國家（澳大利亞、美國、印度和日本）於5月27日的外長會議後，宣布了一項價值200億美元的關鍵礦產框架，旨在減少中國在現代防務、科技及清潔能源產業中的近乎壟斷地位。分析師指出，該計畫的成功取決於四國能否超越政策宣言，實現可衡量的成果。
briefing.background: Quad（四方安全對話）是由澳大利亞、美國、印度和日本組成的戰略聯盟，旨在促進地區安全與經濟合作。隨著全球對關鍵礦產需求的增加，特別是在科技和清潔能源領域，Quad國家意識到必須減少對中國的依賴。中國在鋰、鈷、稀土等關鍵礦產的供應鏈中佔據主導地位，這使得其他國家在面對地緣政治緊張時，感受到供應安全的威脅。因此，Quad的這一新框架被視為一個重要的戰略舉措，旨在加強成員國之間的合作，並推動本地開採及加工能力的提升。
briefing.analysis: Quad的200億美元關鍵礦產框架面臨的挑戰在於如何從政策宣言轉化為實際成果。四國在資金分配、技術共享及市場開放等方面的合作將是成功的關鍵。然而，過去的失敗經驗使得外界對該計畫的可行性表示懷疑。各國在政策目標上可能存在差異，例如，澳大利亞和美國可能更注重於安全與防務，而印度和日本則可能更關心經濟利益及環境影響。這些潛在的利益衝突可能會影響四國的合作效率，並對該框架的實施造成阻礙。

politics.title: Watch: Is the Israel–U.S. alliance straining over Iran?
politics.summary: Tensions appear to be emerging within the Israel–U.S. alliance as differences grow over how to deal with Iran. While Washington seems increasingly open to diplomatic engagement and a potential agreement, Israel continues to advocate a tougher, security-first approach amid escalating regional tensions.In this video, we examine the latest developments in Lebanon, President Trump’s dilemma, the UAE’s role in regional diplomacy, and more.

briefing.news_focus: Tensions appear to be emerging within the Israel–U.S. alliance as differences grow over how to deal with Iran. While Washington seems increasingly open to diplomatic engagement and a potential agreement, Israel continues to advocate a tougher, security-first approach amid escalating regional tensions.In this video, we examine the latest developments in Lebanon, President Trump’s dilemma, the UAE’s role in regional diplomacy, and more.
briefing.news_focus_zh: 以色列與美國之間的聯盟出現緊張，主要因雙方在如何應對伊朗問題上意見不合。美方似乎越來越傾向於外交接觸及潛在協議，而以色列則堅持採取更為強硬的安全優先策略，特別是在地區緊張局勢加劇的背景下。這一變化引發了對兩國關係未來走向的關注。
briefing.background: 以色列與美國的聯盟歷來以安全合作為基礎，尤其在面對伊朗的核計畫及其在中東地區的影響力時。美國在過去的幾年中，特別是在特朗普政府期間，對伊朗採取了強硬立場，並退出了伊朗核協議。然而，隨著拜登政府上任後，對於與伊朗的外交接觸重新開放，這使得以色列對美國的政策感到擔憂，尤其是在伊朗核問題及其地區影響力日益增強的情況下。
briefing.analysis: 此次報導突顯了以色列與美國之間的政策分歧，特別是在應對伊朗的策略上。美國的外交接觸意圖可能使以色列感到其安全利益受到威脅，因為以色列長期以來一直主張對伊朗採取強硬措施。這種分歧可能導致兩國在未來的地區政策上出現更多摩擦，並影響到其他地區國家的外交策略，例如阿聯酋在中東外交中的角色。隨著地區局勢的變化，這種緊張關係可能進一步升級，特別是在面對伊朗的挑戰時。

politics.title: Aviation industry looks skywards as leaders fly in for Rio summit
politics.summary: Oil tankers may be stuck behind strait of Hormuz, but holding the Iata AGM in Brazil defies warnings of impending shortages Nothing says jet fuel crisis, as one prospective attender put it, like flying everyone to Rio de Janeiro. Aviation leaders will converge in Brazil this weekend for the Iata AGM, the annual global airline summit, with the industry still, for the most part, looking resolutely skyward. The oil tankers may still be stuck behind the strait of Hormuz as the conflict between the US, Israel and Iran flickers on, but for now, airlines continue to defy dire warnings of impending shortages which had stoked fears of a summer of chaos for European holidaymakers. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Oil tankers may be stuck behind strait of Hormuz, but holding the Iata AGM in Brazil defies warnings of impending shortages Nothing says jet fuel crisis, as one prospective attender put it, like flying everyone to Rio de Janeiro. Aviation leaders will converge in Brazil this weekend for the Iata AGM, the annual global airline summit, with the industry still, for the most part, looking resolutely skyward. The oil tankers may still be stuck behind the strait of Hormuz as the conflict between the US, Israel and Iran flickers on, but for now, airlines continue to defy dire warnings of impending shortages which had stoked fears of a summer of chaos for European holidaymakers. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 國際航空運輸協會（IATA）年會於本週末在巴西里約熱內盧召開，全球航空業領袖將聚集一堂。儘管霍爾木茲海峽的油輪受阻，且美國、以色列與伊朗之間的衝突仍在持續，航空公司仍然對即將到來的燃料短缺警告不以為然，繼續展望未來。
briefing.background: 當前全球航空業正面臨多重挑戰，包括因伊朗戰爭導致的燃料成本上升及空域受限，這對於航空公司的復甦造成壓力。IATA年會的召開正值這一關鍵時刻，航空公司需在提高票價與限制運力的情況下，應對燃料價格的波動。此外，航空業也面臨新機型短缺的問題，這使得航空公司在擴展運力方面受到限制，進一步影響市場競爭力。
briefing.analysis: 此次IATA年會的召開，反映出航空業在面對燃料危機及市場不確定性時的韌性。儘管有報導指出，伊朗戰爭可能會進一步推高燃料價格，並影響航空運營，但航空公司仍選擇在此時聚集，顯示出他們對未來的信心。參考報導中提到，航空公司可能會透過提高票價和調整運力來應對這些挑戰，這可能會影響消費者的出行選擇。此外，對於新機型的短缺問題，航空公司需要長期規劃以滿足未來需求。各方利益關係的角力將在會議中進一步展現，尤其是如何在成本上升的環境中維持競爭力。

supporting_titles: Aviation leaders face Iran war fuel shock, rising fare prices at Rio summit
supporting_summaries: Global ⁠airline chiefs open their annual summit in Rio de Janeiro on Saturday facing a sharper test of the industry’s post-pandemic recovery, as the Iran war drives up fuel costs and disrupts airspace while carriers try to cushion the blow with higher fares and tighter capacity. The annual meeting of the International Air Transport Association (IATA) from Saturday to Monday ‌comes as that fuel shock collides with another problem airlines cannot quickly fix: a shortage of new aircraft. Boeing and...

economy.title: Blackouts, hyperinflation, dissent: Iran considers perilous prospect of peace
economy.summary: Conditions that led to bloody prewar protests have been made worse, commentators say Iran is already preparing for the perilous transition from wartime unity to a fractious peace marked by hyperinflation, a 10% contraction in the economy, power cuts and calls for a triumphalist government to end its unprecedented hunting down of dissent. With peace not yet secured, the debates within the regime about Iran’s future are only just starting to emerge but its rulers are clearly thinking about how after surviving the war, they can survive the peace. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: Conditions that led to bloody prewar protests have been made worse, commentators say Iran is already preparing for the perilous transition from wartime unity to a fractious peace marked by hyperinflation, a 10% contraction in the economy, power cuts and calls for a triumphalist government to end its unprecedented hunting down of dissent. With peace not yet secured, the debates within the regime about Iran’s future are only just starting to emerge but its rulers are clearly thinking about how after surviving the war, they can survive the peace. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 伊朗正面臨從戰時團結轉向分裂和平的危機，這一過程伴隨著超通脹、經濟收縮10%、停電以及對政府的強烈不滿。評論人士指出，戰爭未結束，政府內部對未來的辯論已經開始，當局正在思考如何在戰後生存，特別是在面對不斷上升的社會不滿與經濟困境的情況下。
briefing.background: 伊朗的經濟在過去幾年中受到多重挑戰，包括國際制裁、內部政策失誤及地緣政治緊張局勢。這些因素導致了高通脹和經濟萎縮，民眾生活困苦，社會不滿情緒高漲。隨著戰爭的持續，政府在維持內部穩定與應對外部壓力之間面臨困難。現在，隨著和平的可能性出現，政府需要重新評估其政策以應對即將到來的挑戰。
briefing.analysis: 伊朗政府在戰後的過渡期面臨著多重挑戰，特別是如何應對經濟困境與社會不滿。政府內部的辯論顯示出不同派系對未來路徑的看法可能存在分歧，部分官員可能主張強硬鎮壓異議，而另一些則可能呼籲改革以緩解民生困境。參考報導未直接涉及伊朗的經濟情況，但提及美元的貶值問題，可能暗示伊朗面臨的國際經濟環境也在影響其內部政策選擇。未來，若無法有效應對經濟問題，可能導致更大的社會動盪與政治不穩定。

supporting_titles: Just how debased is the dollar?
supporting_summaries: Not nearly as much as it could be

economy.title: US imposes new sanctions on Cuban president and Castro family members
economy.summary: US secretary of state Marco Rubio says anyone providing services to listed entities ‘is at risk of sanctions themselves’ The United States has announced fresh economic sanctions on Cuba’s president and some of his immediate family, alongside members of the Castro family, in Washington’s latest ramping up of pressure on its communist-led neighbour. Among those targeted were the son and a grandson of former president Raúl Castro, who no longer holds an official position but remains a key figure on decisions about the future of the island. Continue reading...

briefing.news_focus: US secretary of state Marco Rubio says anyone providing services to listed entities ‘is at risk of sanctions themselves’ The United States has announced fresh economic sanctions on Cuba’s president and some of his immediate family, alongside members of the Castro family, in Washington’s latest ramping up of pressure on its communist-led neighbour. Among those targeted were the son and a grandson of former president Raúl Castro, who no longer holds an official position but remains a key figure on decisions about the future of the island. Continue reading...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 美國宣布對古巴總統及卡斯特羅家族成員實施新經濟制裁。美國國務卿馬可·魯比奧表示，任何向被列名實體提供服務的人都可能面臨制裁。此次制裁的對象包括前總統勞爾·卡斯特羅的兒子及孫子，儘管勞爾已不再擔任官方職位，但仍對古巴未來的決策有重要影響。
briefing.background: 美國與古巴的關係長期緊張，尤其是在古巴共產主義政權下。自2015年以來，兩國在奧巴馬政府時期曾有過接觸，但隨著特朗普政府的上任，對古巴的制裁政策再次強化。美國政府希望通過經濟制裁迫使古巴政府進行政治改革，並改善人權狀況。此次制裁的對象包括卡斯特羅家族成員，顯示出美國對古巴內部權力結構的直接關注。
briefing.analysis: 此次制裁的具體新增內容包括針對古巴總統及卡斯特羅家族成員的直接經濟制裁，這是美國對古巴施壓的最新舉措。根據參考報導，特朗普總統強調美國希望古巴成為一個「良好管理的國家」，這表明美國對古巴內部治理的期望。這些制裁可能會進一步加劇古巴的經濟困境，並可能引發古巴政府的強烈反應。美國的制裁政策在國內外均存在爭議，支持者認為這是促進變革的必要手段，而反對者則認為這會加深古巴人民的困苦，無助於改善人權狀況。

supporting_titles: U.S. imposes sanctions on Cuban President, Treasury website shows
supporting_summaries: The sanctions were announced as U.S. President ‌Donald Trump told reporters that the U.S. wanted Cuba “to be a nicely run country.”

economy.title: The problem with Japan’s bid to strengthen energy security, supply chains
economy.summary: What is in effect Japan’s version of the Belt and Road Initiative is being rolled out at an accelerating pace. But unlike China’s global infrastructure initiative, which mainly takes the form of highways, railways and sea lanes, Japan’s project is all about energy networks and supply chains. It poses a further challenge to America’s waning economic and strategic influence in Asia, the world’s most populous, resource-rich and potentially powerful region. What is more, it is a cooperative venture...

briefing.news_focus: What is in effect Japan’s version of the Belt and Road Initiative is being rolled out at an accelerating pace. But unlike China’s global infrastructure initiative, which mainly takes the form of highways, railways and sea lanes, Japan’s project is all about energy networks and supply chains. It poses a further challenge to America’s waning economic and strategic influence in Asia, the world’s most populous, resource-rich and potentially powerful region. What is more, it is a cooperative venture...
briefing.news_focus_zh: 日本正在推動一項類似於中國「一帶一路」的計畫，旨在加強其能源安全與供應鏈。這項計畫的推進速度加快，主要集中在建立能源網絡和供應鏈，與中國的基礎設施建設有所不同。這一舉措對美國在亞洲的經濟和戰略影響力構成了進一步挑戰，因為亞洲是全球人口最多、資源最豐富且潛力巨大的地區。
briefing.background: 日本的能源安全問題日益受到重視，特別是在全球能源市場波動及地緣政治緊張的背景下。隨著對可再生能源的需求增加以及對外依賴的減少，日本政府正積極尋求多元化的能源供應來源。這一背景促使日本推動類似於中國「一帶一路」的計畫，專注於能源網絡和供應鏈的建設，以確保其能源安全和經濟穩定。
briefing.analysis: 日本的這一計畫可能會改變亞洲的能源格局，並對美國的影響力造成挑戰。日本希望通過加強與其他國家的合作，來提升自身在全球能源市場中的地位。這一舉措也可能引發地區內其他國家的關注和反應，特別是那些依賴中國投資的國家。儘管目前沒有其他報導提供進一步的細節，但可以預見，這一計畫將在未來引發各方的競爭與合作動態，尤其是在資源分配和市場開放方面。
